---
title: "README"
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-01"
---
Our  package centers a dataset from kaggle called economicIndicators_data. It measures economic indicators such as population, the year, the country name, the Gross Domestic Product (GDP), and the AMA exchange rate. Our functions would mainly deal with providing information about a country and its factors such as GDP per population of a specific year, the highest GDP per year, and the country's GDP per population over time.
